title: Sochi
description: Explore Sochi — Olympic Park, city sights, Stalin's Dacha, and the stunning Black Sea coast.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Sochi
itinerary.description:
Morning arrival. Meet with our representative at the airport.
Individual transfer to the city by comfortable coach.
Hotel check in. Early check-in is subject to availability.

itinerary.title: Panoramic City Tour
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
10:00 — Panoramic city tour which includes the most interesting sights of Sochi: the famous Olympic Park and Fisht Olympic Stadium, the Sea Port Embankment, Riviera Park, Stalin's Dacha, the Sochi Art Museum, the iconic Sochi Arboretum botanical gardens, and the breathtaking views of the Black Sea coast.
During the tour you will have several stops to enjoy the views and take pictures.
15:00 — Return to the hotel. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Sochi
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Day free for leisure. Enjoy the Black Sea beaches, explore the Krasnaya Polyana mountain resort, or take a stroll along the Sochi seafront promenade.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Check out and transfer to the airport. We bid you farewell and hope to welcome you back to the wonders of Russia soon.

inclusions.text: 3 nights stay in Sochi BB (Park Inn Radisson Sochi / Gorki Grand Hotel 4★ or similar)
3 buffet breakfasts in the hotel
Sochi city tour with guide (4 hours)
Professional English speaking guide during the tours
Comfortable transport with A/C during the tours
Return airport & railway station transfer without guide (Russian speaking driver — English speaking guide available at $60 for 2 pax)
Return PCR test with transfer

title: Moscow
hotelNotes: Moscow: Cosmos / Maxima Slavia 3★ or similar

itinerary.title: Moscow
itinerary.description: Morning arrival. Meet with our representative at the airport. Individual transfer to the city by comfortable coach. Hotel check in. Early check-in is due to availability.

itinerary.title: Moscow City Tour
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
10:00 — Panoramic city tour which includes the most interesting historical sights of the city: the Red Square, the Kremlin (outside), GUM mall, Nikolskaya st., Alexander's garden, Zaryadie park, the Floating Bridge, Christ the Savior Cathedral, New Maiden Convent (outside), Victory Park, Sparrow hills observation platform where the amazing view of the city opens. During the tour you will have several stops to enjoy the views and take pictures.
Metro tour. Walk along the Arbat street — so-called Russian Montmartre — one of the oldest streets of Moscow with more than 500 years history.
15:00 — Arrival at the hotel. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Moscow
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Day free for leisure.

itinerary.title: Free Day & PCR Test
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Day free for leisure.
Transfer to the clinic for PCR test. The exact time will be communicated in advance.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Check out and transfer to the airport.

inclusions.text: 4 nights stay in Moscow BB (Cosmos / Maxima Slavia 3★ or similar)
4 buffet breakfasts in the hotel
Moscow city tour with metro ride (5 hours)
Professional English speaking guide during the tours
Comfortable transport with A/C during the tours
Return airport & railway station transfer without guide (Russian speaking driver — English speaking guide available at $60 for 2 pax)
Return PCR test with transfer

itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
10:00 — City orientation tour. Our professional guide will tell you about the history of the resort town. Walk along the seaside promenade, stroll through the alleys of the famous Riviera park and visit the healing springs Matsesta. The program will continue in Arboretum park where you will learn about the flora and fauna of the region. Visit the Olympic Park — venue of the Olympic Games 2014.
14:00 — Arrival at the hotel. Overnight at the hotel.

title: Golden Ring Tour
hotelNotes: Moscow: Holiday Inn / Novotel 4★ | Saint Petersburg: Park Inn Radisson / Dostoevsky 4★ | Suzdal: Azimut 3★ | Rostov: Marins 3★ | Kostroma: Azimut 3★ | Yaroslavl: IBIS or similar

itinerary.title: Moscow
itinerary.description: Arrival at the airport. Meet with our representative. Transfer to the city. Hotel check in. Early check-in is due to availability. Dinner. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Moscow City Tour
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
10:00 — Panoramic city tour: Red Square, GUM mall, Nikolskaya st., Alexander's garden, Zaryadie park, the Floating Bridge, Christ the Savior Cathedral, New Maiden Convent (outside), Victory Park, Sparrow Hills observation platform. During the tour you will have several stops to enjoy the views and take pictures.
Metro tour. Walk along the Arbat street — so-called Russian Montmartre — one of the oldest streets of Moscow with more than 500 years history.
Tour to the territory of the Kremlin.
15:00 — Arrival at the hotel. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Moscow – Sergiev Posad
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
09:00 — Departure to Sergiev Posad. Excursion to the Saint Trinity Sergius Lavra. You will be impressed by the medieval Russian architecture: gorgeous cathedrals with gold covered domes and the tallest in Russia 88-metre-high beautiful belfry.
Lunch in the local café.
15:00 — Arrival at the hotel. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Moscow – Suzdal
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
08:00 — Departure to Vladimir (200 km north-east from Moscow). City tour: the Golden Gates (1158), Cathedral of St. Demetrius (outside), and the Assumption Cathedral (outside) — a magnificent 12th-century Orthodox temple.
Lunch in the local café. Departure to Suzdal. Check in at the hotel. Dinner in the local café. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Suzdal – Kostroma
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel. Visit the Kremlin of Suzdal (outside) — formed since the 12th century under the influence of each prince of Suzdal.
Lunch in the local café. Departure to Kostroma. On the way, sightseeing tour in Ivanovo — the textile capital of Russia and city of brides.
Arrival in Kostroma. Check in at the hotel. Dinner in the local café. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Kostroma – Yaroslavl
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel. City tour in Kostroma.
Departure to Yaroslavl.
Lunch in the local café. City tour in Yaroslavl: the arrow of the Volga and Kotorosl rivers, the Assumption Cathedral, the Volzhskaya embankment, and the unique architectural ensemble of the central part of Yaroslavl — included in the UNESCO World Heritage List.
Dinner in the local café. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Yaroslavl – Rostov
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel. Departure to Rostov the Great — mentioned in chronicles of 862 AD. City tour: serene Lake Nero, strict and elegant monasteries, the stately Kremlin.
Lunch in the local café. Check in at the hotel in Yaroslavl. Dinner in the local café. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Rostov – Moscow
itinerary.description: Breakfast at the hotel. Departure to Moscow. Check in at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Moscow – Saint Petersburg
itinerary.description: Breakfast at the hotel. Transfer to the train station. Sapsan train to Saint Petersburg. Meet with your driver at the station. Check in at the hotel. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Saint Petersburg
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
10:00 — Tour to the Hermitage. Panoramic city tour: Nevsky Prospect, the Admiralty, the Winter Palace, St. Isaac's Cathedral, Church of Resurrection on Spilled Blood, Fine Arts Square, Smolny Cathedral, Bronze Horseman, Mars Field, Kazan Cathedral. Several stops to enjoy the views and take pictures.
15:00 — Arrival at the hotel. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Saint Petersburg
itinerary.description:
Breakfast in the hotel.
10:00 — Tour to the Peterhof Palace and Park. Neva river boat ride. Transfer to the clinic for PCR test. The exact time will be given in advance.
14:00 — Arrival at the hotel. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Saint Petersburg
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Day free for leisure.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Check out and transfer to the airport.

gallery.alt: Saint Petersburg — Church on Spilled Blood

inclusions.text: 3 nights in Moscow BB (Holiday Inn / Novotel 4★ or similar)
4 nights in Saint Petersburg BB (Park Inn Radisson / Hotel Dostoevsky 4★ or similar)
1 night in Suzdal BB (Azimut 3★ or similar)
1 night in Rostov BB (Marins 3★ or similar)
1 night in Kostroma BB (Azimut 3★ or similar)
1 night in Yaroslavl BB (IBIS or similar)
12 buffet breakfasts
4 lunches & dinners during Golden Ring
Moscow city tour with metro ride (5 hours)
Saint Petersburg city tour (5 hours)
Entry tickets: Metro, Kremlin, Hermitage, Peterhof, Neva boat ride
Professional English speaking guide during all tours
Comfortable transport with A/C during the tours
Sapsan train ticket Moscow – Saint Petersburg, economy class
Airport / station transfers
Return PCR test with transfer

title: Murmansk
description: Experience the Arctic city of Murmansk — city tour, the Lenin icebreaker museum, and an unforgettable Aurora Borealis hunting tour.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Murmansk City Tour
itinerary.description:
Arrival at the airport. Meet with our representative.
Hotel check in. Early check-in is subject to availability.
Transfer to the city — Murmansk city tour exploring the monuments, Alyosha Memorial (the famous soldier statue overlooking the bay), the Seamen's Memorial, and the Arctic city's unique landscapes.
Overnight at the hotel.

highlights.text: — board the world's first nuclear-powered icebreaker, now a museum ship docked in Murmansk harbour.
— head out into the Arctic wilderness in search of the spectacular Northern Lights dancing across the polar sky.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Murmansk
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Day free for leisure. Explore the Murmansk Regional Museum, visit the local markets for Arctic delicacies, or take a stroll along the Kola Bay waterfront.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Murmansk
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Day free for leisure. Optional activities include husky sledding, snowmobile tours (seasonal), or a visit to the Sami Village to learn about the indigenous peoples of the Kola Peninsula.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Check out and transfer to the airport. We bid you farewell and hope to welcome you back to the wonders of Arctic Russia soon.

inclusions.text: 3 nights stay in Murmansk 3★ hotel BB
City tour of Murmansk with guide
Icebreaker "Lenin" museum entry ticket
Aurora Borealis hunting tour
Transportation and guide as per the itinerary
Transfers airport – hotel – airport

title: Saint Petersburg
description: Discover the cultural capital of Russia — Nevsky Prospect, the Winter Palace, St. Isaac's Cathedral, and the stunning metro tour.

itinerary.title: Arrival in St. Petersburg
itinerary.description:
Morning arrival. Meet with our representative at the airport.
Individual transfer to the city by comfortable coach.
Hotel check in. Early check-in is subject to availability.

itinerary.title: Panoramic City Tour
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
10:00 — Panoramic city tour which includes the most interesting historical sights of the city: Nevsky Prospect, the Admiralty, the Winter Palace, St. Isaac's Cathedral, Church of the Resurrection on Spilled Blood, Fine Arts Square, Smolny Cathedral, the Bronze Horseman, Mars Field, and a visit to Kazan Cathedral.
Metro tour — explore the stunning architecture of St. Petersburg's famous metro stations. During the excursion you will have short stops to enjoy the views and take pictures.
Transfer to the clinic for PCR test. The exact time will be communicated in advance.
15:00 — Return to the hotel. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Free Day in St. Petersburg
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Day free for leisure. Explore the world-famous Hermitage Museum, stroll along the Neva River embankment, or visit the Peterhof Palace and its spectacular fountains.

itinerary.title: Leisure & PCR Test
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Day free for leisure.
Transfer to the clinic for PCR test. The exact time will be communicated in advance.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description:
Breakfast at the hotel.
Check out and transfer to the airport. We bid you farewell and hope to welcome you back to the wonders of Russia soon.
